\tzpentry{ID4332}{Smallmatrix Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4332 introduces Smallmatrix Hamiltonian Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$(\begin{smallmatrix}q^{n+1}\ p^{n+1}\end{smallmatrix}) = \Phi_{\Delta t}^{\mathcal{H}}(\begin{smallmatrix}q^{n}\ p^{n}\end{smallmatrix})$
\]
